roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT, NON COMPLIANCE/X:COURT RE-REFERS THE DEFENDANT TO SFSO/ORNAS/BE/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BEFITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORTTO 70 OAK GROVE BY CLOSE OF BUSINESS ON 01-29-20/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/STWPX/VD:02-05-20/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE IN DEPT, 22 ON 01-31-20/DOP/TBH:19014877 AND 19016763/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:01-15-20/987,2/BAIL: 5000/X:UPON POSTING BAIL, DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD INCLUDING A WARRANTLESS SEARCH CONDITION/CTORD:DEFENDANTIS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY AFTER MAKING BAIL/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
/CAL:DISPO/MO138572:19016763/CTORD:ELECTRONIC MONITORING REQUIREMENT TERMINATED AND GPS DEVICE REMOVED/
